<!DOCTYPE html>
<html xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" lang="en" xml:lang="en"><head>

<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="generator" content="quarto-1.8.26">

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes">

<meta name="author" content="Joe Brady">

<title>Campus Dorm &amp; Crime Analysis</title>
<style>
code{white-space: pre-wrap;}
span.smallcaps{font-variant: small-caps;}
div.columns{display: flex; gap: min(4vw, 1.5em);}
div.column{flex: auto; overflow-x: auto;}
div.hanging-indent{margin-left: 1.5em; text-indent: -1.5em;}
ul.task-list{list-style: none;}
ul.task-list li input[type="checkbox"] {
width: 0.8em;
margin: 0 0.8em 0.2em -1em;  vertical-align: middle;
}

html { -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; }
pre > code.sourceCode { white-space: pre; position: relative; }
pre > code.sourceCode > span { display: inline-block; line-height: 1.25; }
pre > code.sourceCode > span:empty { height: 1.2em; }
.sourceCode { overflow: visible; }
code.sourceCode > span { color: inherit; text-decoration: inherit; }
div.sourceCode { margin: 1em 0; }
pre.sourceCode { margin: 0; }
@media screen {
div.sourceCode { overflow: auto; }
}
@media print {
pre > code.sourceCode { white-space: pre-wrap; }
pre > code.sourceCode > span { text-indent: -5em; padding-left: 5em; }
}
pre.numberSource code
{ counter-reset: source-line 0; }
pre.numberSource code > span
{ position: relative; left: -4em; counter-increment: source-line; }
pre.numberSource code > span > a:first-child::before
{ content: counter(source-line);
position: relative; left: -1em; text-align: right; vertical-align: baseline;
border: none; display: inline-block;
-webkit-touch-callout: none; -webkit-user-select: none;
-khtml-user-select: none; -moz-user-select: none;
-ms-user-select: none; user-select: none;
padding: 0 4px; width: 4em;
}
pre.numberSource { margin-left: 3em; padding-left: 4px; }
div.sourceCode
{ }
@media screen {
pre > code.sourceCode > span > a:first-child::before { text-decoration: underline; }
}
</style>

<style type="text/css">.tippy-box[data-animation=fade][data-state=hidden]{opacity:0}[data-tippy-root]{max-width:calc(100vw - 10px)}.tippy-box{position:relative;background-color:#333;color:#fff;border-radius:4px;font-size:14px;line-height:1.4;white-space:normal;outline:0;transition-property:transform,visibility,opacity}.tippy-box[data-placement^=top]>.tippy-arrow{bottom:0}.tippy-box[data-placement^=top]>.tippy-arrow:before{bottom:-7px;left:0;border-width:8px 8px 0;border-top-color:initial;transform-origin:center top}.tippy-box[data-placement^=bottom]>.tippy-arrow{top:0}.tippy-box[data-placement^=bottom]>.tippy-arrow:before{top:-7px;left:0;border-width:0 8px 8px;border-bottom-color:initial;transform-origin:center bottom}.tippy-box[data-placement^=left]>.tippy-arrow{right:0}.tippy-box[data-placement^=left]>.tippy-arrow:before{border-width:8px 0 8px 8px;border-left-color:initial;right:-7px;transform-origin:center left}.tippy-box[data-placement^=right]>.tippy-arrow{left:0}.tippy-box[data-placement^=right]>.tippy-arrow:before{left:-7px;border-width:8px 8px 8px 0;border-right-color:initial;transform-origin:center right}.tippy-box[data-inertia][data-state=visible]{transition-timing-function:cubic-bezier(.54,1.5,.38,1.11)}.tippy-arrow{width:16px;height:16px;color:#333}.tippy-arrow:before{content:"";position:absolute;border-color:transparent;border-style:solid}.tippy-content{position:relative;padding:5px 9px;z-index:1}</style>

<style type="text/css">
@font-face {
font-display: block;
font-family: "bootstrap-icons";
src: url(data:font/woff;base64,) format("woff");
}
.bi::before,
[class^="bi-"]::before,
[class*=" bi-"]::before {
display: inline-block;
font-family: bootstrap-icons !important;
font-style: normal;
font-weight: normal !important;
font-variant: normal;
text-transform: none;
line-height: 1;
vertical-align: -.125em;
-webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
-moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}
.bi-123::before { content: "\f67f"; }
.bi-alarm-fill::before { content: "\f101"; }
.bi-alarm::before { content: "\f102"; }

.bi-align-end::before { content: "\f105"; }

.bi-align-top::before { content: "\f108"; }
.bi-alt::before { content: "\f109"; }
.bi-app-indicator::before { content: "\f10a"; }
.bi-app::before { content: "\f10b"; }
.bi-archive-fill::before { content: "\f10c"; }
.bi-archive::before { content: "\f10d"; }
.bi-arrow-90deg-down::before { content: "\f10e"; }

.bi-arrow-90deg-up::before { content: "\f111"; }

.bi-arrow-clockwise::before { content: "\f116"; }
.bi-arrow-counterclockwise::before { content: "\f117"; }
.bi-arrow-down-circle-fill::before { content: "\f118"; }
.bi-arrow-down-circle::before { content: "\f119"; }
.bi-arrow-down-left-circle-fill::before { content: "\f11a"; }
.bi-arrow-down-left-circle::before { content: "\f11b"; }

.bi-arrow-down-left-square::before { content: "\f11d"; }
.bi-arrow-down-left::before { content: "\f11e"; }

.bi-arrow-down-right-square-fill::before { content: "\f121"; }

.bi-arrow-left-circle-fill::before { content: "\f129"; }

<body class="quarto-light">

<div id="quarto-content" class="page-columns page-rows-contents page-layout-article toc-left">
<div id="quarto-sidebar-toc-left" class="sidebar toc-left">
  <nav id="TOC" role="doc-toc" class="toc-active">
    <h2 id="toc-title">Table of contents</h2>
   
  <ul>
  <li><a href="#introduction" id="toc-introduction" class="nav-link active" data-scroll-target="#introduction">Introduction</a>
  <ul class="collapse">
  <li><a href="#load-packages" id="toc-load-packages" class="nav-link" data-scroll-target="#load-packages">Load Packages</a></li>
  </ul></li>
  <li><a href="#web-scraping-dorm-rector-info" id="toc-web-scraping-dorm-rector-info" class="nav-link" data-scroll-target="#web-scraping-dorm-rector-info">Web scraping: dorm / rector info</a>
  <ul class="collapse">
  <li><a href="#step-1-get-all-the-links-to-dorm-web-pages" id="toc-step-1-get-all-the-links-to-dorm-web-pages" class="nav-link" data-scroll-target="#step-1-get-all-the-links-to-dorm-web-pages">Step 1: get all the links to dorm web pages</a></li>
  <li><a href="#step-2-harvest-data-from-links" id="toc-step-2-harvest-data-from-links" class="nav-link" data-scroll-target="#step-2-harvest-data-from-links">Step 2: Harvest data from links</a></li>
  <li><a href="#topic-analysis" id="toc-topic-analysis" class="nav-link" data-scroll-target="#topic-analysis">Topic Analysis</a></li>
  <li><a href="#interpretation" id="toc-interpretation" class="nav-link" data-scroll-target="#interpretation">Interpretation</a></li>
  </ul></li>
  <li><a href="#crime-data" id="toc-crime-data" class="nav-link" data-scroll-target="#crime-data">Crime Data</a>
  <ul class="collapse">
  <li><a href="#cleaning-offence---implementing-fuzzy-match" id="toc-cleaning-offence---implementing-fuzzy-match" class="nav-link" data-scroll-target="#cleaning-offence---implementing-fuzzy-match">cleaning offence - implementing fuzzy match</a></li>
  <li><a href="#plot-results" id="toc-plot-results" class="nav-link" data-scroll-target="#plot-results">Plot results</a></li>
  <li><a href="#dorm-data-collegiate-vice-crimes-comparison" id="toc-dorm-data-collegiate-vice-crimes-comparison" class="nav-link" data-scroll-target="#dorm-data-collegiate-vice-crimes-comparison">Dorm data: collegiate vice crimes comparison</a></li>
  </ul></li>
  </ul>
</nav>
</div>
<div id="quarto-margin-sidebar" class="sidebar margin-sidebar zindex-bottom">
</div>
<main class="content" id="quarto-document-content">

<header id="title-block-header" class="quarto-title-block default">
<div class="quarto-title">
<h1 class="title">Campus Dorm &amp; Crime Analysis</h1>
</div>



<div class="quarto-title-meta">

    <div>
    <div class="quarto-title-meta-heading">Author</div>
    <div class="quarto-title-meta-contents">
             <p>Joe Brady </p>
          </div>
  </div>
    
  
    
  </div>
  


</header>


<section id="introduction" class="level2">
<h2 class="anchored" data-anchor-id="introduction">Introduction</h2>
<p>This project will be a two part excercise. First, I will scrape the Notre Dame dorm pages to pull dorm stats, descriptions, rectors, and rector bios. Then, I will do a topic analysis to see if I can group dorms and/or rectors based on text topic analysis (BERT).</p>
<p>For part two, I will do analysis on a only semi-structured dataset: Notre Dame Police Department (NDPD) crime blotters that are released daily as a PDF, from 2020 to present (Feb 2026). These files are stored in Google Drive, so for ease of use I read all the PDFs for the daily reports and combined them into one csv via a google colab script. The csv loaded in to this code page is the output of that script.</p>
<p>For the crime data, I will answer (1) if there are any growth/decline in campus crime, (2) if there is seasonality to crime, (3) what type of crime is committed, (4) where does it occur on campus, and (5) what dorms have the highest rate of ‘college vice’ crimes, i.e. drinking, fake IDs, drugs, and public intoxication.</p>
<section id="load-packages" class="level3">
<h3 class="anchored" data-anchor-id="load-packages">Load Packages</h3>
<div id="42e43386" class="cell" data-execution_count="1">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb1"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb1-1"><a href="#cb1-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">from</span> bs4 <span class="im">import</span> BeautifulSoup</span>
<span id="cb1-2"><a href="#cb1-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">import</span> pandas <span class="im">as</span> pd</span>
<span id="cb1-3"><a href="#cb1-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">import</span> re</span>
<span id="cb1-4"><a href="#cb1-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">import</span> random</span>
<span id="cb1-5"><a href="#cb1-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">import</span> time</span>
<span id="cb1-6"><a href="#cb1-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">import</span> requests</span>
<span id="cb1-7"><a href="#cb1-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">import</span> numpy <span class="im">as</span> np</span>
<span id="cb1-8"><a href="#cb1-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">from</span> thefuzz <span class="im">import</span> process, fuzz</span>
<span id="cb1-9"><a href="#cb1-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">from</span> bertopic <span class="im">import</span> BERTopic</span>
<span id="cb1-10"><a href="#cb1-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">from</span> bertopic.vectorizers <span class="im">import</span> ClassTfidfTransformer</span>
<span id="cb1-11"><a href="#cb1-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">from</span> joblib <span class="im">import</span> load, dump</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="web-scraping-dorm-rector-info" class="level2">
<h2 class="anchored" data-anchor-id="web-scraping-dorm-rector-info">Web scraping: dorm / rector info</h2>
<section id="step-1-get-all-the-links-to-dorm-web-pages" class="level3">
<h3 class="anchored" data-anchor-id="step-1-get-all-the-links-to-dorm-web-pages">Step 1: get all the links to dorm web pages</h3>
<p>This first code chunk does the first request for the pages that have the links we will need for scraping. The first one is mens dorms, the second women dorms.</p>
<div id="700b5655" class="cell" data-execution_count="2">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb2"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb2-1"><a href="#cb2-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#mens dorm links requeset</span></span>
<span id="cb2-2"><a href="#cb2-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>m_link <span class="op">=</span> <span class="st">&#39;https://residentiallife.nd.edu/undergraduate/residence-halls/mens-halls/&#39;</span></span>
<span id="cb2-3"><a href="#cb2-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>m_request <span class="op">=</span> requests.get(m_link)</span>
<span id="cb2-4"><a href="#cb2-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>m_soup <span class="op">=</span> BeautifulSoup(m_request.content, features<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&quot;lxml&quot;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb2-5"><a href="#cb2-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb2-6"><a href="#cb2-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>time.sleep(<span class="fl">1.1</span>)</span>
<span id="cb2-7"><a href="#cb2-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb2-8"><a href="#cb2-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#womens dorm links request</span></span>
<span id="cb2-9"><a href="#cb2-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>w_link <span class="op">=</span> <span class="st">&#39;https://residentiallife.nd.edu/undergraduate/residence-halls/womens-halls/&#39;</span></span>
<span id="cb2-10"><a href="#cb2-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>w_request <span class="op">=</span> requests.get(w_link)</span>
<span id="cb2-11"><a href="#cb2-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>w_soup <span class="op">=</span> BeautifulSoup(w_request.content, features<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&quot;lxml&quot;</span>)</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
</div>
<p>This code chunk finds all the links to dorm description pages, which we will use in subsequent scraping</p>
<div id="00fc325b" class="cell" data-execution_count="3">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb3"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb3-1"><a href="#cb3-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#mens links</span></span>
<span id="cb3-2"><a href="#cb3-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>step1_m <span class="op">=</span> m_soup.select(<span class="st">&#39;[class = &quot;columns medium-6 large-4&quot;] a&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb3-3"><a href="#cb3-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>men_links <span class="op">=</span> [a.get(<span class="st">&#39;href&#39;</span>) <span class="cf">for</span> a <span class="kw">in</span> step1_m]</span>
<span id="cb3-4"><a href="#cb3-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb3-5"><a href="#cb3-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#womens links</span></span>
<span id="cb3-6"><a href="#cb3-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>step1_w <span class="op">=</span> w_soup.select(<span class="st">&#39;[class = &quot;columns medium-6 large-4&quot;] a&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb3-7"><a href="#cb3-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>women_links <span class="op">=</span> [a.get(<span class="st">&#39;href&#39;</span>) <span class="cf">for</span> a <span class="kw">in</span> step1_w]</span>
<span id="cb3-8"><a href="#cb3-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb3-9"><a href="#cb3-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#correct_format</span></span>
<span id="cb3-10"><a href="#cb3-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>men_links <span class="op">=</span> [<span class="st">&#39;https://residentiallife.nd.edu&#39;</span> <span class="op">+</span> link <span class="cf">for</span> link <span class="kw">in</span> men_links]</span>
<span id="cb3-11"><a href="#cb3-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>women_links <span class="op">=</span> [<span class="st">&#39;https://residentiallife.nd.edu&#39;</span> <span class="op">+</span> link <span class="cf">for</span> link <span class="kw">in</span> women_links]</span>
<span id="cb3-12"><a href="#cb3-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb3-13"><a href="#cb3-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#combine</span></span>
<span id="cb3-14"><a href="#cb3-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>dorm_links <span class="op">=</span> men_links <span class="op">+</span> women_links</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="step-2-harvest-data-from-links" class="level3">
<h3 class="anchored" data-anchor-id="step-2-harvest-data-from-links">Step 2: Harvest data from links</h3>
<p>This loop iterates through the found links from above and scrapes for description, dorm stats such as quad location, capacity, and gender, and rectors &amp; their biographies.</p>
<div id="22a395c2" class="cell" data-execution_count="4">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb4"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb4-1"><a href="#cb4-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#initialize_data</span></span>
<span id="cb4-2"><a href="#cb4-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>data_store <span class="op">=</span> []</span>
<span id="cb4-3"><a href="#cb4-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb4-4"><a href="#cb4-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#loop to get data</span></span>
<span id="cb4-5"><a href="#cb4-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="cf">for</span> link <span class="kw">in</span> dorm_links:</span>
<span id="cb4-6"><a href="#cb4-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">#request</span></span>
<span id="cb4-7"><a href="#cb4-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    req <span class="op">=</span> requests.get(link)</span>
<span id="cb4-8"><a href="#cb4-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    soup <span class="op">=</span> BeautifulSoup(req.content, features <span class="op">=</span> <span class="st">&#39;lxml&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb4-9"><a href="#cb4-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb4-10"><a href="#cb4-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">#name of dorm</span></span>
<span id="cb4-11"><a href="#cb4-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    name <span class="op">=</span> soup.select(<span class="st">&#39;.page-title&#39;</span>)[<span class="dv">0</span>].text</span>
<span id="cb4-12"><a href="#cb4-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb4-13"><a href="#cb4-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">#dorm description</span></span>
<span id="cb4-14"><a href="#cb4-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    temp <span class="op">=</span> soup.select_one(<span class="st">&#39;.page-title&#39;</span>).find_next_siblings(<span class="st">&#39;p&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb4-15"><a href="#cb4-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    description <span class="op">=</span> <span class="st">&#39;&#39;</span></span>
<span id="cb4-16"><a href="#cb4-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="cf">for</span> p <span class="kw">in</span> temp:</span>
<span id="cb4-17"><a href="#cb4-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        description <span class="op">=</span> description <span class="op">+</span> <span class="st">&#39; &#39;</span> <span class="op">+</span> p.text</span>
<span id="cb4-18"><a href="#cb4-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    description <span class="op">=</span> description.strip()</span>
<span id="cb4-19"><a href="#cb4-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb4-20"><a href="#cb4-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">#rector name and bio</span></span>
<span id="cb4-21"><a href="#cb4-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    rector <span class="op">=</span> soup.select(<span class="st">&#39;.profile-item-name&#39;</span>)[<span class="dv">0</span>].text</span>
<span id="cb4-22"><a href="#cb4-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    rector_bio <span class="op">=</span> soup.select(<span class="st">&#39;.profile-item-bio&#39;</span>)[<span class="dv">0</span>].text</span>
<span id="cb4-23"><a href="#cb4-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb4-24"><a href="#cb4-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">#hall stats</span></span>
<span id="cb4-25"><a href="#cb4-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    parents <span class="op">=</span> soup.select_one(<span class="st">&#39;[class=&quot;section-title color-orange&quot;]+.card-section&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb4-26"><a href="#cb4-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    labels <span class="op">=</span> [a.text.lower().replace(<span class="st">&#39; &#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;_&#39;</span>) <span class="cf">for</span> a <span class="kw">in</span> parents.find_all(<span class="st">&#39;dt&#39;</span>)]</span>
<span id="cb4-27"><a href="#cb4-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    data <span class="op">=</span> [a.text <span class="cf">for</span> a <span class="kw">in</span> parents.find_all(<span class="st">&#39;dd&#39;</span>)]</span>
<span id="cb4-28"><a href="#cb4-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb4-29"><a href="#cb4-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">#start row dictionary</span></span>
<span id="cb4-30"><a href="#cb4-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    row <span class="op">=</span> {</span>
<span id="cb4-31"><a href="#cb4-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="st">&#39;name&#39;</span>: name,</span>
<span id="cb4-32"><a href="#cb4-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="st">&#39;description&#39;</span>: description,</span>
<span id="cb4-33"><a href="#cb4-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="st">&#39;rector&#39;</span>: rector,</span>
<span id="cb4-34"><a href="#cb4-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="st">&#39;rector_bio&#39;</span>: rector_bio</span>
<span id="cb4-35"><a href="#cb4-35" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    }</span>
<span id="cb4-36"><a href="#cb4-36" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb4-37"><a href="#cb4-37" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">#put other stats together in row</span></span>
<span id="cb4-38"><a href="#cb4-38" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    row <span class="op">=</span> row <span class="op">|</span> <span class="bu">dict</span>(<span class="bu">zip</span>(labels, data))</span>
<span id="cb4-39"><a href="#cb4-39" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb4-40"><a href="#cb4-40" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">#append data</span></span>
<span id="cb4-41"><a href="#cb4-41" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    data_store.append(row)</span>
<span id="cb4-42"><a href="#cb4-42" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb4-43"><a href="#cb4-43" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="co">#sleep pause</span></span>
<span id="cb4-44"><a href="#cb4-44" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    time.sleep(<span class="dv">1</span> <span class="op">+</span>random.randint(<span class="dv">0</span>, <span class="dv">10</span>)<span class="op">/</span><span class="dv">100</span>)</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
</div>
<p>This fixes two dorms that don’t have a quad.</p>
<div id="ee5467ba" class="cell" data-execution_count="5">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb5"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb5-1"><a href="#cb5-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>dorm_df <span class="op">=</span> pd.DataFrame(data_store)</span>
<span id="cb5-2"><a href="#cb5-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>dorm_df.loc[dorm_df[<span class="st">&#39;quad&#39;</span>]<span class="op">==</span><span class="st">&#39;&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;quad&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> <span class="st">&quot;Dunne/Flaherty&quot;</span></span>
<span id="cb5-3"><a href="#cb5-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>dorm_df.head()</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
<div class="cell-output cell-output-display" data-execution_count="5">
<div>

<td>Built in 1937, Zahm Hall is named in honor of ...</td>

<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">4</th>
<td>Dillon Hall</td>
<td>Constructed in 1931 in honor of the second pre...</td>
<td>Rev. Ed Dolphin, C.S.C.</td>
<td>Fr. Ed Dolphin, CSC grew up in the lovely conf...</td>
<td>253</td>
<td>9</td>
<td>1931</td>
<td>South</td>
<td>Male</td>
<td>St. Patrick</td>
<td>3</td>
<td>132</td>
<td>No</td>
<td>No</td>
<td>Big Red</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="topic-analysis" class="level3">
<h3 class="anchored" data-anchor-id="topic-analysis">Topic Analysis</h3>
<p>Next, we do topic analysis for both the dorm description and the rector biography. We use BERT, which usually doesn’t function super well without a lot of data. However, I like BERT because of its grouping system and the fact that it outputs the representative document for the topic group. Moreover, if we remove stopwords first, BERT does better (for small datasets; BERT usually likes to use stopwords to analyze context)</p>
<p>This code chunk loads in our open source stopwords list and creates cleaned text without these stopwords</p>
<div id="a73a8466" class="cell" data-execution_count="6">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb6"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb6-1"><a href="#cb6-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>topic_df <span class="op">=</span> dorm_df.copy()</span>
<span id="cb6-2"><a href="#cb6-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb6-3"><a href="#cb6-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#get stopwords list</span></span>
<span id="cb6-4"><a href="#cb6-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>stopwords <span class="op">=</span> requests.get(<span class="st">&#39;https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stopwords-iso/stopwords-en/refs/heads/master/stopwords-en.txt&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb6-5"><a href="#cb6-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>stopwords <span class="op">=</span> stopwords.text.split(<span class="st">&#39;</span><span class="ch">\n</span><span class="st">&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb6-6"><a href="#cb6-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb6-7"><a href="#cb6-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#remove stopwords from text</span></span>
<span id="cb6-8"><a href="#cb6-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>stopword_pattern <span class="op">=</span> <span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">\b</span>(?:<span class="vs">{}</span>)<span class="dv">\b</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>.<span class="bu">format</span>(<span class="st">&#39;|&#39;</span>.join(stopwords))</span>
<span id="cb6-9"><a href="#cb6-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>topic_df[<span class="st">&#39;description_clean&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> topic_df[<span class="st">&#39;description&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(stopword_pattern, <span class="st">&#39;&#39;</span>, regex<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb6-10"><a href="#cb6-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>topic_df[<span class="st">&#39;rector_bio_clean&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> topic_df[<span class="st">&#39;rector_bio&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(stopword_pattern, <span class="st">&#39;&#39;</span>, regex<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
</div>
<p>This code chunk sets up the BERT model and transformer used, and then fits the model to the two datasets - dorm descriptions and rector biographies. We then save the model and fit data into a file so we don’t have to go through the training process every time we want to analyze the fit data topics. (For this small a set it really doesn’t matter as fitting the model takes seconds, but this is good practice.)</p>
<div id="30a365bc" class="cell" data-execution_count="7">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb7"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb7-1"><a href="#cb7-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#define transformer</span></span>
<span id="cb7-2"><a href="#cb7-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>ctfidf_model <span class="op">=</span> ClassTfidfTransformer(</span>
<span id="cb7-3"><a href="#cb7-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  reduce_frequent_words<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span></span>
<span id="cb7-4"><a href="#cb7-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb7-5"><a href="#cb7-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb7-6"><a href="#cb7-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#define model</span></span>
<span id="cb7-7"><a href="#cb7-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>topic_model_desc <span class="op">=</span> BERTopic(ctfidf_model<span class="op">=</span>ctfidf_model)</span>
<span id="cb7-8"><a href="#cb7-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>topic_model_bio <span class="op">=</span> BERTopic(ctfidf_model<span class="op">=</span>ctfidf_model)</span>
<span id="cb7-9"><a href="#cb7-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb7-10"><a href="#cb7-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fit transform model</span></span>
<span id="cb7-11"><a href="#cb7-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>desc_topics, desc_probs <span class="op">=</span> topic_model_desc.fit_transform(topic_df[<span class="st">&#39;description_clean&#39;</span>].to_list())</span>
<span id="cb7-12"><a href="#cb7-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>bio_topics, bio_probs <span class="op">=</span> topic_model_bio.fit_transform(topic_df[<span class="st">&#39;rector_bio_clean&#39;</span>].to_list())</span>
<span id="cb7-13"><a href="#cb7-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb7-14"><a href="#cb7-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#dump file into file in my folder</span></span>
<span id="cb7-15"><a href="#cb7-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>dump(</span>
<span id="cb7-16"><a href="#cb7-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  [topic_model_desc, desc_topics, desc_probs], </span>
<span id="cb7-17"><a href="#cb7-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&quot;topic_model_desc.joblib&quot;</span> <span class="co">#saves to current working folder</span></span>
<span id="cb7-18"><a href="#cb7-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb7-19"><a href="#cb7-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb7-20"><a href="#cb7-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>dump(</span>
<span id="cb7-21"><a href="#cb7-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  [topic_model_bio, bio_topics, bio_probs], </span>
<span id="cb7-22"><a href="#cb7-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&quot;topic_model_bio.joblib&quot;</span> <span class="co">#saves to current working folder</span></span>
<span id="cb7-23"><a href="#cb7-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
<div class="cell-output cell-output-display" data-execution_count="7">
<pre><code>[&#39;topic_model_bio.joblib&#39;]</code></pre>
</div>
</div>
<p>#Next, we load the model and results back in and look at the results.</p>
<div id="98d9acab" class="cell" data-execution_count="8">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb9"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb9-1"><a href="#cb9-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>topic_model_desc, desc_topics, desc_probs <span class="op">=</span> load(</span>
<span id="cb9-2"><a href="#cb9-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&#39;topic_model_desc.joblib&#39;</span></span>
<span id="cb9-3"><a href="#cb9-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb9-4"><a href="#cb9-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb9-5"><a href="#cb9-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>topic_model_bio, bio_topics, bio_probs <span class="op">=</span> load(</span>
<span id="cb9-6"><a href="#cb9-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>  <span class="st">&#39;topic_model_bio.joblib&#39;</span></span>
<span id="cb9-7"><a href="#cb9-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span>
<span id="cb9-8"><a href="#cb9-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb9-9"><a href="#cb9-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#print topics table</span></span>
<span id="cb9-10"><a href="#cb9-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>display(topic_model_desc.get_topic_info())</span>
<span id="cb9-11"><a href="#cb9-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>display(topic_model_bio.get_topic_info())</span>
<span id="cb9-12"><a href="#cb9-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb9-13"><a href="#cb9-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>model_bio_df <span class="op">=</span> topic_model_bio.get_topic_info()</span>
<span id="cb9-14"><a href="#cb9-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb9-15"><a href="#cb9-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>topic_df[<span class="st">&#39;bio_topic&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> topic_model_bio.get_document_info(topic_df[<span class="st">&#39;rector_bio_clean&#39;</span>])[<span class="st">&#39;Topic&#39;</span>]</span>
<span id="cb9-16"><a href="#cb9-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="cf">for</span> topic <span class="kw">in</span> topic_df[<span class="st">&#39;bio_topic&#39;</span>].unique().tolist():</span>
<span id="cb9-17"><a href="#cb9-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="bu">print</span>(<span class="ss">f&quot;Topic (</span><span class="sc">{</span>topic<span class="sc">}</span><span class="ss">):&quot;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb9-18"><a href="#cb9-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    display(topic_df.loc[topic_df[<span class="st">&#39;bio_topic&#39;</span>]<span class="op">==</span>topic, [<span class="st">&#39;name&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;rector&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;rector_bio&#39;</span>]])</span>
<span id="cb9-19"><a href="#cb9-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="bu">print</span>(model_bio_df.loc[model_bio_df[<span class="st">&#39;Topic&#39;</span>]<span class="op">==</span>topic, <span class="st">&#39;Representative_Docs&#39;</span>])</span>
<span id="cb9-20"><a href="#cb9-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="bu">print</span>(<span class="st">&#39;</span><span class="ch">\n</span><span class="st">&#39;</span>)</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>

<div>

<td>Ally Liedtke</td>
<td>Ally Liedtke serves in the Megan K. Crowley En...</td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">30</th>
<td>Walsh Hall</td>
<td>Cheyenne Joseph</td>
<td>Cheyenne grew up on a farm on the outskirts of...</td>
</tr>
<tr class="odd">
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">31</th>
<td>Welsh Family Hall</td>
<td>Monica Murphy</td>
<td>Born and raised in South Bend, Monica has pers...</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</div>
</div>
<div class="cell-output cell-output-stdout">
<pre><code>1    [Originally   Dominican Republic, Marlyn Batis...
Name: Representative_Docs, dtype: object

</code></pre>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="interpretation" class="level3">
<h3 class="anchored" data-anchor-id="interpretation">Interpretation</h3>
<p>Dorm description only has 1 topic, so the texts are pretty uniform. Nothing interesting to note here unfortunately.</p>
<p>For rector biography, BERT has found three different ‘classes’ of rectors that Notre Dame employs.</p>
<p>Class 1 are the religious rectors: priests and brothers of the Holy Cross order. However, there are two exceptions: Joey Quinones of Coyle Community in Zahm Hall, and Cory Hodson in Keenan Hall. Cory is deeply religious as well and has a masters in divinity, so that possibly explains his inclusion. Joey is a mystery however. All of these rectors are Men’s dorm rectors, and almost all are priests or brothers.</p>
<p>Class -1 are three male dorm rectors that were seperated from the others. They are two laypeople and one priest. They appear to be united by an interest in sports and growing up in the suburbs, and are younger. Rev Mike Ryan is an inexplicable inclusion.</p>
<p>Class 0 are all the Womens dorm rectors. They are not priests or brothers, and BERT really picked up on the “she” difference in the biographies.</p>
</section>
</section>
<section id="crime-data" class="level2">
<h2 class="anchored" data-anchor-id="crime-data">Crime Data</h2>
<p>Next, we will look at NDPD’s crime data from Jan 1 2020 to present (Feb 2026). As said before, there is a google colab script that pulls in all the daily PDFs from NDSP’s public google driveand combines them into one csv file, which we will pull in now</p>
<div id="e0d37c76" class="cell" data-execution_count="9">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb14"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb14-1"><a href="#cb14-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df <span class="op">=</span> pd.read_csv(<span class="st">&quot;crime_2020to2026_all.csv&quot;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb14-2"><a href="#cb14-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df <span class="op">=</span> crime_df.drop(columns <span class="op">=</span> [<span class="st">&#39;Unnamed: 0&#39;</span>])</span>
<span id="cb14-3"><a href="#cb14-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>display(crime_df.head())</span>
<span id="cb14-4"><a href="#cb14-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df.shape</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
<div class="cell-output cell-output-display">
<div>

<div class="cell-output cell-output-display" data-execution_count="9">
<pre><code>(7385, 7)</code></pre>

</div>
<p>This finds any screwed up rows - any rows with NaN present. The data in the PDFs is very solid and does not ever have missing data, so any missing data indicates a screw up with the pdf reader (tabula) used in the colab script.</p>
<div id="d1613d4f" class="cell" data-execution_count="10">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb16"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb16-1"><a href="#cb16-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#show how many messed up rows we have. Only 8, so just drop them</span></span>
<span id="cb16-2"><a href="#cb16-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="bu">print</span>(<span class="ss">f&quot;total f&#39;d rows: </span><span class="sc">{</span>crime_df<span class="sc">.</span>isna()<span class="sc">.</span>astype(<span class="bu">int</span>)<span class="sc">.</span><span class="bu">sum</span>(axis<span class="op">=</span><span class="dv">1</span>)<span class="sc">.</span><span class="bu">sum</span>()<span class="sc">}</span><span class="ss">&quot;</span>) </span>
<span id="cb16-3"><a href="#cb16-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb16-4"><a href="#cb16-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#drop the rows</span></span>
<span id="cb16-5"><a href="#cb16-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df <span class="op">=</span> crime_df.loc[<span class="op">~</span>crime_df.isna().astype(<span class="bu">int</span>).<span class="bu">sum</span>(axis<span class="op">=</span><span class="dv">1</span>).astype(<span class="bu">bool</span>)].reset_index(drop<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb16-6"><a href="#cb16-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df.shape</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
<div class="cell-output cell-output-stdout">
<pre><code>total f&#39;d rows: 8</code></pre>
</div>
<div class="cell-output cell-output-display" data-execution_count="10">
<pre><code>(7382, 7)</code></pre>
</div>
</div>
<p>This codde does converts the datetime columns to a datetime format, and then attempts to extract a building from the listed address. The address column is very messy, not uniform in format or categories, and contains copious typos. My guess is that the officer is quickly typing up the address in the report, and officers differ in their description of places.</p>
<p>I found a minor pattern - the use of semicolons to highlight an actual building. However, sometimes the building name is between two semicolons (202 irish blvd; Dunne Hall; outside sidewalk), but sometimes they are at the end of the string and seperated by a semicolon (205 irish road; Keenan Hall). Generally, the longer string is actually the building name, so we go with that.</p>
<div id="6c08b411" class="cell" data-execution_count="11">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb19"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb19-1"><a href="#cb19-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#convert datetime columns to datetime datatype</span></span>
<span id="cb19-2"><a href="#cb19-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="cf">for</span> col <span class="kw">in</span> [col <span class="cf">for</span> col <span class="kw">in</span> crime_df.columns <span class="cf">if</span> <span class="st">&#39;_dt&#39;</span> <span class="kw">in</span> col]:</span>
<span id="cb19-3"><a href="#cb19-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    crime_df[col] <span class="op">=</span> pd.to_datetime(crime_df[col], errors <span class="op">=</span> <span class="st">&#39;coerce&#39;</span>) <span class="co">#coerce non-datetime</span></span>
<span id="cb19-4"><a href="#cb19-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb19-5"><a href="#cb19-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#extract building from address</span></span>
<span id="cb19-6"><a href="#cb19-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>temp<span class="op">=</span> pd.DataFrame([])</span>
<span id="cb19-7"><a href="#cb19-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>temp[<span class="st">&#39;middle&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;address&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.extract(<span class="vs">r&#39;;</span><span class="dv">\s</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="kw">(</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">+?</span><span class="kw">)</span><span class="dv">\s</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">;&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb19-8"><a href="#cb19-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>temp[<span class="st">&#39;end&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;address&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.extract(<span class="vs">r&#39;;</span><span class="dv">\s</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="kw">(</span><span class="pp">[^;]</span><span class="op">+</span><span class="kw">)</span><span class="dv">\s</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="dv">$</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb19-9"><a href="#cb19-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb19-10"><a href="#cb19-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>temp.loc[temp[<span class="st">&#39;middle&#39;</span>].isna(), <span class="st">&#39;middle&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> <span class="st">&#39;&#39;</span></span>
<span id="cb19-11"><a href="#cb19-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>temp.loc[temp[<span class="st">&#39;end&#39;</span>].isna(), <span class="st">&#39;end&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> <span class="st">&#39;&#39;</span></span>
<span id="cb19-12"><a href="#cb19-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb19-13"><a href="#cb19-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> np.where(</span>
<span id="cb19-14"><a href="#cb19-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    temp[<span class="st">&#39;middle&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.<span class="bu">len</span>() <span class="op">&gt;=</span> temp[<span class="st">&#39;end&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.<span class="bu">len</span>(),</span>
<span id="cb19-15"><a href="#cb19-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    temp[<span class="st">&#39;middle&#39;</span>],</span>
<span id="cb19-16"><a href="#cb19-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    temp[<span class="st">&#39;end&#39;</span>]</span>
<span id="cb19-17"><a href="#cb19-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>)</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
</div>
<p>The buildings are still quite a disaster, with many typos and non-uniform descriptions. I manually went through the entire list to correct all the issues and make sure each building had 1 actual name. I did this (1) to feel the weight of data cleaning, and (2) because so many buildings had similar names, fuzzy match would often fail. For example, there is a Welsh Hall, a Welsh Family Hall, a Walsh Hall, and a Walsh Family Hall - nightmare for fuzzy match! We will use fuzzy match later for crimes.</p>
<div id="332afccf" class="cell" data-execution_count="12">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb20"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb20-1"><a href="#cb20-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#clean up</span></span>
<span id="cb20-2"><a href="#cb20-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df.loc[crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>]<span class="op">==</span><span class="st">&#39;&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">None</span></span>
<span id="cb20-3"><a href="#cb20-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.title()</span>
<span id="cb20-4"><a href="#cb20-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-5"><a href="#cb20-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#specific cleanup - Fischer</span></span>
<span id="cb20-6"><a href="#cb20-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">Fisch</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Fischer Residence&#39;</span>, regex<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-7"><a href="#cb20-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#get rid of numbers only buildings</span></span>
<span id="cb20-8"><a href="#cb20-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df.loc[crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.contains(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^\d</span><span class="op">+</span><span class="dv">$</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, regex<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>, na<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">False</span>), <span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">None</span></span>
<span id="cb20-9"><a href="#cb20-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#get rid of Pkg which is screwing things up</span></span>
<span id="cb20-10"><a href="#cb20-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="st">&#39;Pkg&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-11"><a href="#cb20-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-12"><a href="#cb20-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#Fix Beichner Community</span></span>
<span id="cb20-13"><a href="#cb20-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">Beichner Comm</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Beichner Community Center&#39;</span>, regex<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-14"><a href="#cb20-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-15"><a href="#cb20-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix basilica</span></span>
<span id="cb20-16"><a href="#cb20-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">Basilica</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Basilica Of The Sacred Heart&#39;</span>, regex<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-17"><a href="#cb20-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-18"><a href="#cb20-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix arlotta lacross and alumni soccer stadium</span></span>
<span id="cb20-19"><a href="#cb20-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">Alumni Soc</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Alumni Soccer Stadium&#39;</span>, regex<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-20"><a href="#cb20-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">Arlotta Lac</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Arlotta Lacrosse Stadium&#39;</span>, regex<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-21"><a href="#cb20-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-22"><a href="#cb20-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix bookstore</span></span>
<span id="cb20-23"><a href="#cb20-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">Bookstore</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Bookstore Lot Area&#39;</span>, regex<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-24"><a href="#cb20-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-25"><a href="#cb20-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Bulla</span></span>
<span id="cb20-26"><a href="#cb20-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">Bulla</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Bulla Lot&#39;</span>, regex<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-27"><a href="#cb20-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-28"><a href="#cb20-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Golf</span></span>
<span id="cb20-29"><a href="#cb20-29" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">Burke Golf</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Burke Golf Course&#39;</span>, regex<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-30"><a href="#cb20-30" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-31"><a href="#cb20-31" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Cavenaugh</span></span>
<span id="cb20-32"><a href="#cb20-32" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">Cavanaugh</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Cavanaugh Hall&#39;</span>, regex<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-33"><a href="#cb20-33" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-34"><a href="#cb20-34" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix ice arena</span></span>

<span id="cb20-121"><a href="#cb20-121" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Mendoza Col</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Mendoza College of Business&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-122"><a href="#cb20-122" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-123"><a href="#cb20-123" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Morris inn lot</span></span>

<span id="cb20-137"><a href="#cb20-137" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
