<span id="cb20-139"><a href="#cb20-139" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">Fatima</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Our Lady Of Fatima House&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-140"><a href="#cb20-140" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">Lady Of Lordes</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Our Lady of Lordes&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-141"><a href="#cb20-141" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-142"><a href="#cb20-142" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix pasq centet</span></span>
<span id="cb20-143"><a href="#cb20-143" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Pasquerilla Cent</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Pasquerilla Center&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-144"><a href="#cb20-144" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-145"><a href="#cb20-145" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix pasq east</span></span>
<span id="cb20-146"><a href="#cb20-146" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Pasquerilla Hall E</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Pasquerilla Hall East&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-147"><a href="#cb20-147" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-148"><a href="#cb20-148" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="st">&#39;Pasquerilla Hall East&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Pasquerilla East Hall&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-149"><a href="#cb20-149" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-150"><a href="#cb20-150" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix pasq west</span></span>
<span id="cb20-151"><a href="#cb20-151" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Pasquerilla Hall W</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Pasquerilla Hall West&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-152"><a href="#cb20-152" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-153"><a href="#cb20-153" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="st">&#39;Pasquerilla Hall West&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Pasquerilla West Hall&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-154"><a href="#cb20-154" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-155"><a href="#cb20-155" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix purcell</span></span>
<span id="cb20-156"><a href="#cb20-156" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Purcell</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Purcell Pavilion&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-157"><a href="#cb20-157" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-158"><a href="#cb20-158" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Raclin</span></span>
<span id="cb20-159"><a href="#cb20-159" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Raclin Car</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Raclin Carmichael Hall&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-160"><a href="#cb20-160" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-161"><a href="#cb20-161" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Rockne</span></span>
<span id="cb20-162"><a href="#cb20-162" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Rockne</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Rockne Memorial&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-163"><a href="#cb20-163" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-164"><a href="#cb20-164" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Stadium</span></span>
<span id="cb20-165"><a href="#cb20-165" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Stadl</span><span class="dv">$</span><span class="cf">|</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Stadm</span><span class="dv">$</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Notre Dame Stadium&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-166"><a href="#cb20-166" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-167"><a href="#cb20-167" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Stepan</span></span>
<span id="cb20-168"><a href="#cb20-168" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Stepan Che</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Stepan Chemistry Hall&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-169"><a href="#cb20-169" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-170"><a href="#cb20-170" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Transpo</span></span>
<span id="cb20-171"><a href="#cb20-171" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">transportation</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Transportation Services&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-172"><a href="#cb20-172" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-173"><a href="#cb20-173" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Wash Arch</span></span>
<span id="cb20-174"><a href="#cb20-174" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Walsh</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs"> L&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Walsh Architecture Lot&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-175"><a href="#cb20-175" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-176"><a href="#cb20-176" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Warren golf</span></span>
<span id="cb20-177"><a href="#cb20-177" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Warren Golf</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Warren Golf Course&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-178"><a href="#cb20-178" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-179"><a href="#cb20-179" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Wellness Center</span></span>
<span id="cb20-180"><a href="#cb20-180" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Wellness</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Wellness Center&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-181"><a href="#cb20-181" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-182"><a href="#cb20-182" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Wilson Lot</span></span>
<span id="cb20-183"><a href="#cb20-183" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Wilson</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">Lot&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Wilson Lot&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-184"><a href="#cb20-184" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-185"><a href="#cb20-185" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Zahm</span></span>
<span id="cb20-186"><a href="#cb20-186" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">^</span><span class="vs">Zahm</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Zahm Hall&#39;</span>, regex <span class="op">=</span> <span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb20-187"><a href="#cb20-187" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-188"><a href="#cb20-188" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#get rid of any erroneous doublespaces or white space</span></span>
<span id="cb20-189"><a href="#cb20-189" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="st">&#39;  &#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39; &#39;</span>).<span class="bu">str</span>.strip()</span>
<span id="cb20-190"><a href="#cb20-190" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb20-191"><a href="#cb20-191" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#make unique list to help more cleaning </span></span>
<span id="cb20-192"><a href="#cb20-192" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>unique_list<span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].unique().tolist()</span>
<span id="cb20-193"><a href="#cb20-193" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>unique_list <span class="op">=</span> [x <span class="cf">for</span> x <span class="kw">in</span> unique_list <span class="cf">if</span> x <span class="kw">is</span> <span class="kw">not</span> <span class="va">None</span>]</span>
<span id="cb20-194"><a href="#cb20-194" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>unique_list.sort()</span>
<span id="cb20-195"><a href="#cb20-195" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#unique_list[235:]</span></span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
</div>
<section id="cleaning-offence---implementing-fuzzy-match" class="level3">
<h3 class="anchored" data-anchor-id="cleaning-offence---implementing-fuzzy-match">cleaning offence - implementing fuzzy match</h3>
<p>This chunk uses fuzzy match to bubble up crimes. I pulled out what seemed to be the highest level description for the crimes, and then fuzzy match finds similar crime descriptions and labels them with the general level. This is great because it deals with both typos and minor differences in crime descriptions automatically.</p>
<div id="d2437102" class="cell" data-execution_count="13">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb21"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb21-1"><a href="#cb21-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;offence&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;offence&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="st">&#39;</span><span class="ch">\r</span><span class="st">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39; &#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb21-2"><a href="#cb21-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;offence&#39;</span>].value_counts()[<span class="dv">0</span>:<span class="dv">25</span>] <span class="co">#check top crimes</span></span>
<span id="cb21-3"><a href="#cb21-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-4"><a href="#cb21-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>offence_buckets <span class="op">=</span> [<span class="st">&#39;LIQUOR VIOLATION&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;THEFT&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;DRUG VIOLATION&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;TRESPASS&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;POSSESSION OF FALSE GOVERNMENT IDENTIFICATION&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;PUBLIC INTOXICATION&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;CRIMINAL MISCHIEF&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;FRAUD&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;INTIMIDATION&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;HARASSMENT&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;LEAVING THE SCENE OF A VEHICLE CRASH&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;BATTERY&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;BURGLARY&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;RESISTING LAW ENFORCEMENT&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;OPERATING A VEHICLE WHILE INTOXICATED&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;SEXUAL BATTERY&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;VANDALISM&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;DRIVING WITHOUT A LICENSE/SUSPENDED&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;STALKING&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;DISORDERLY CONDUCT&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;RAPE&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;MOTOR VEHICLE THEFT&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;PUBLIC INDECENCY&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;WEAPON VIOLATION&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;FALSE REPORTING&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;DOMESTIC BATTERY&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;RECKLESS DRIVING&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;FALSE PRESENSE/CONFIDENCE GAME&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;CRIMINAL RECKLESSNESS&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;VOYEURISM&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;POSSESSION OF STOLEN PROPERTY&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;CRIMINAL CONFINEMENT&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;RESIDENTIAL ENTRY&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;INTERFERING WITH PUBLIC SAFETY&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;INVASION OF PRIVACY&#39;</span>]</span>
<span id="cb21-5"><a href="#cb21-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-6"><a href="#cb21-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#we probably need to define a function to apply fuzzy matching</span></span>
<span id="cb21-7"><a href="#cb21-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="kw">def</span> offence_match(offence, offence_buckets):</span>
<span id="cb21-8"><a href="#cb21-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="cf">if</span> pd.isna(offence) <span class="kw">or</span> offence <span class="op">==</span> <span class="st">&#39;&#39;</span>: <span class="co">#safety for NaN vals</span></span>
<span id="cb21-9"><a href="#cb21-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="cf">return</span> <span class="va">None</span></span>
<span id="cb21-10"><a href="#cb21-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    match, score <span class="op">=</span> process.extractOne(offence, offence_buckets, scorer<span class="op">=</span>fuzz.token_set_ratio)</span>
<span id="cb21-11"><a href="#cb21-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-12"><a href="#cb21-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="cf">if</span> score <span class="op">&gt;</span> <span class="dv">60</span>: </span>
<span id="cb21-13"><a href="#cb21-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="cf">return</span> match</span>
<span id="cb21-14"><a href="#cb21-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>    <span class="cf">else</span>:</span>
<span id="cb21-15"><a href="#cb21-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>        <span class="cf">return</span> offence</span>
<span id="cb21-16"><a href="#cb21-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb21-17"><a href="#cb21-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#apply function</span></span>
<span id="cb21-18"><a href="#cb21-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;offence_cat&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;offence&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">apply</span>(offence_match, args <span class="op">=</span> (offence_buckets,))</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="plot-results" class="level3">
<h3 class="anchored" data-anchor-id="plot-results">Plot results</h3>
<p>Now we will do some plotting to look at interesting trends!</p>
<p>packages needed:</p>
<div id="adc41276" class="cell" data-execution_count="14">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb22"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb22-1"><a href="#cb22-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">import</span> seaborn <span class="im">as</span> sns</span>
<span id="cb22-2"><a href="#cb22-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">import</span> matplotlib.pyplot <span class="im">as</span> plt</span>
<span id="cb22-3"><a href="#cb22-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">import</span> matplotlib.dates <span class="im">as</span> mdates</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
</div>
<p>The first plot looks at the time series of total crime. We can see a clear dip to almost zero crimes reported right as covid hit, and then a swell of crimes for the 2022-2023 school year, possibly due to student anxst at dealing with covid restrictions the previous year. Generally, it appears that the swells of crimes reported around school years is going down as the years go by.</p>
<div id="45450be5" class="cell" data-execution_count="15">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb23"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb23-1"><a href="#cb23-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_ts <span class="op">=</span> crime_df.groupby(pd.Grouper(key<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;reported_dt&#39;</span>, freq<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;MS&#39;</span>)).size().reset_index(name<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;count&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb23-2"><a href="#cb23-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_ts[<span class="st">&#39;label&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_ts[<span class="st">&#39;reported_dt&#39;</span>].dt.strftime(<span class="st">&#39;%b %Y&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb23-3"><a href="#cb23-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb23-4"><a href="#cb23-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>ax <span class="op">=</span> sns.barplot(crime_ts, x<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;reported_dt&#39;</span>, y<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;count&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb23-5"><a href="#cb23-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>labels <span class="op">=</span> [l[<span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">4</span>:] <span class="cf">if</span> <span class="st">&#39;Jan&#39;</span> <span class="kw">in</span> l <span class="cf">else</span> <span class="st">&#39;&#39;</span> <span class="cf">for</span> l <span class="kw">in</span> crime_ts[<span class="st">&#39;label&#39;</span>]]</span>
<span id="cb23-6"><a href="#cb23-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>ax.set_xticklabels(labels)</span>
<span id="cb23-7"><a href="#cb23-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.xticks(rotation<span class="op">=</span><span class="dv">90</span>)</span>
<span id="cb23-8"><a href="#cb23-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.xlabel(<span class="st">&#39;&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb23-9"><a href="#cb23-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.ylabel(<span class="st">&#39;Count of crimes&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb23-10"><a href="#cb23-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.title(<span class="st">&#39;Count of crime reports from 2020 to Feb 2026&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb23-11"><a href="#cb23-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.show()</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
<div class="cell-output cell-output-display">
<div>
<figure class="figure">
<p><img role="img" src="data:image/png;base64," width="593" height="452" class="figure-img"></p>
</figure>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p>This second plot looks seasonality of crime for campus. We see a big peak for the football season - September and October. The cold airs of November and the throu literally chills crime relative to the rest of football season, but surprisingly crime stays somewhat higher for December, January, and February. This is quite surprising, as most of January students are on break, but perhaps the return of students in Jan and the early semester of Feb leads to more crime instances. Unsurprsingly, the least amound of crime is in the summer, when campus is relatively empty.</p>
<div id="a1a51e2c" class="cell" data-execution_count="16">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb24"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb24-1"><a href="#cb24-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="im">import</span> calendar</span>
<span id="cb24-2"><a href="#cb24-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_ts <span class="op">=</span> crime_df.groupby(pd.Grouper(key<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;reported_dt&#39;</span>, freq<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;MS&#39;</span>)).size().reset_index(name<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;count&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb24-3"><a href="#cb24-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_season <span class="op">=</span> crime_ts.groupby(crime_ts[<span class="st">&#39;reported_dt&#39;</span>].dt.month).mean(<span class="st">&#39;count&#39;</span>).reset_index()</span>
<span id="cb24-4"><a href="#cb24-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb24-5"><a href="#cb24-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>crime_season[<span class="st">&#39;month_label&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> crime_season[<span class="st">&#39;reported_dt&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">apply</span>(<span class="kw">lambda</span> x: calendar.month_abbr[<span class="bu">int</span>(x)])</span>
<span id="cb24-6"><a href="#cb24-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb24-7"><a href="#cb24-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>ax <span class="op">=</span> sns.barplot(crime_season, x<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;month_label&#39;</span>, y<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;count&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb24-8"><a href="#cb24-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.xlabel(<span class="st">&#39;&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb24-9"><a href="#cb24-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.ylabel(<span class="st">&#39;Count of crimes&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb24-10"><a href="#cb24-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.title(<span class="st">&#39;Average number of crimes reported by month&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb24-11"><a href="#cb24-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.show()</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
<div class="cell-output cell-output-display">
<div>
<figure class="figure">
<p><img role="img" src="data:image/png;base64," width="593" height="431" class="figure-img"></p>
</figure>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p>This plot shows what the most common crimes are. Liquor violations make up almost 50% of all crimes reported, and liquor violations plus thefts are almost all crimes.</p>
<div id="3010c1ff" class="cell" data-execution_count="17">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb25"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb25-1"><a href="#cb25-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>data_cat <span class="op">=</span> crime_df.copy()</span>
<span id="cb25-2"><a href="#cb25-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>data_cat <span class="op">=</span> data_cat.groupby(<span class="st">&#39;offence_cat&#39;</span>).size().reset_index(name<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;pct_crime&#39;</span>).sort_values(<span class="st">&#39;pct_crime&#39;</span>, ascending<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">False</span>).reset_index(drop<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb25-3"><a href="#cb25-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb25-4"><a href="#cb25-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>data_cat[<span class="st">&#39;pct_crime&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> <span class="dv">100</span> <span class="op">*</span> data_cat[<span class="st">&#39;pct_crime&#39;</span>] <span class="op">/</span> <span class="bu">len</span>(crime_df)</span>
<span id="cb25-5"><a href="#cb25-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb25-6"><a href="#cb25-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>sns.barplot(data_cat.loc[:<span class="dv">20</span>, :], x<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;pct_crime&#39;</span>, y<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;offence_cat&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb25-7"><a href="#cb25-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.xlabel(<span class="st">&#39;Percent of total crimes&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb25-8"><a href="#cb25-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.ylabel(<span class="st">&#39;&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb25-9"><a href="#cb25-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.title(<span class="st">&#39;Percent of crimes by offence, 2020 to Feb 2026&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb25-10"><a href="#cb25-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.show()</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
<div class="cell-output cell-output-display">
<div>
<figure class="figure">
<p><img role="img" src="data:image/png;base64," width="911" height="449" class="figure-img"></p>
</figure>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p>This plot shows the top 20 locations of crime on campus, with a color breakout of the top 6 crimes committed (anything not in the top 6 crimes labeled ‘OTHER’). Liquor violations at ND stadium are the vast majority, but noteable there are very few thefts. Thefts occur at common spaces - student centers, libraries, and classroom buildings such as Debartolo Hall. Alcohol incidences return as major contributors for crime at most residential halls.</p>
<div id="56ccf358" class="cell" data-execution_count="18">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb26"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb26-1"><a href="#cb26-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>data_loc <span class="op">=</span> crime_df.loc[crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].notna()]</span>
<span id="cb26-2"><a href="#cb26-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#reset to 6 biggest crimes for color</span></span>
<span id="cb26-3"><a href="#cb26-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>data_loc.loc[<span class="op">~</span>data_loc[<span class="st">&#39;offence_cat&#39;</span>].isin(data_cat.loc[:<span class="dv">6</span>, <span class="st">&#39;offence_cat&#39;</span>]), <span class="st">&#39;offence_cat&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> <span class="st">&#39;OTHER&#39;</span></span>
<span id="cb26-4"><a href="#cb26-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#find top crime locs</span></span>
<span id="cb26-5"><a href="#cb26-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>top_places_df <span class="op">=</span> data_loc.groupby(<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>).size().reset_index(name<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;count&#39;</span>).sort_values(<span class="st">&#39;count&#39;</span>, ascending<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">False</span>).reset_index(drop<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb26-6"><a href="#cb26-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>top_places <span class="op">=</span> top_places_df.loc[:<span class="dv">20</span>, <span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].to_list()</span>
<span id="cb26-7"><a href="#cb26-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb26-8"><a href="#cb26-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#sort data loc for only these buildings</span></span>
<span id="cb26-9"><a href="#cb26-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>data_loc <span class="op">=</span> data_loc.loc[data_loc[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].isin(top_places)]</span>
<span id="cb26-10"><a href="#cb26-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb26-11"><a href="#cb26-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#group by building and offence cat</span></span>
<span id="cb26-12"><a href="#cb26-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>data <span class="op">=</span> data_loc.groupby([<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;offence_cat&#39;</span>]).size().reset_index(name<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;count&#39;</span>).sort_values(<span class="st">&#39;count&#39;</span>, ascending<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">False</span>).reset_index(drop<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb26-13"><a href="#cb26-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb26-14"><a href="#cb26-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#stack data stuff i need to do (AI help, didnt know how to do this)</span></span>
<span id="cb26-15"><a href="#cb26-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>stacked_data <span class="op">=</span> pd.crosstab(data_loc[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>], data_loc[<span class="st">&#39;offence_cat&#39;</span>])</span>
<span id="cb26-16"><a href="#cb26-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>stacked_data <span class="op">=</span> stacked_data.loc[top_places[::<span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">1</span>]]</span>
<span id="cb26-17"><a href="#cb26-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>offense_totals <span class="op">=</span> stacked_data.<span class="bu">sum</span>(axis<span class="op">=</span><span class="dv">0</span>).sort_values(ascending<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb26-18"><a href="#cb26-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>stacked_data <span class="op">=</span> stacked_data[offense_totals.index]</span>
<span id="cb26-19"><a href="#cb26-19" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb26-20"><a href="#cb26-20" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>stacked_data.plot(kind<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;barh&#39;</span>, </span>
<span id="cb26-21"><a href="#cb26-21" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  stacked<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>, </span>
<span id="cb26-22"><a href="#cb26-22" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  figsize<span class="op">=</span>(<span class="dv">12</span>, <span class="dv">8</span>), </span>
<span id="cb26-23"><a href="#cb26-23" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  width<span class="op">=</span><span class="fl">0.8</span>,</span>
<span id="cb26-24"><a href="#cb26-24" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>                  edgecolor<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;white&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb26-25"><a href="#cb26-25" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.legend(title<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;Offense Category&#39;</span>, bbox_to_anchor<span class="op">=</span>(<span class="dv">1</span>, <span class="dv">0</span>), loc<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;lower right&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb26-26"><a href="#cb26-26" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.xlabel(<span class="st">&#39;count of reports&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb26-27"><a href="#cb26-27" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.title(<span class="st">&#39;Total count of crimes by location 2020 to Feb 2026&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb26-28"><a href="#cb26-28" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.show()</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
<div class="cell-output cell-output-display">
<div>
<figure class="figure">
<p><img role="img" src="data:image/png;base64," width="1109" height="671" class="figure-img"></p>
</figure>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="dorm-data-collegiate-vice-crimes-comparison" class="level3">
<h3 class="anchored" data-anchor-id="dorm-data-collegiate-vice-crimes-comparison">Dorm data: collegiate vice crimes comparison</h3>
<p>Next we will look at dorms only as locations of crime. First, we need to filter our crime data for dorms only. We will utilize the scraped dorm data from before for ease of use.</p>
<div id="e1788f04" class="cell" data-execution_count="19">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb27"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb27-1"><a href="#cb27-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>dorms <span class="op">=</span> dorm_df.copy()</span>
<span id="cb27-2"><a href="#cb27-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#fix Zahm so it will match data in crime reports</span></span>
<span id="cb27-3"><a href="#cb27-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>dorms[<span class="st">&#39;name&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> dorms[<span class="st">&#39;name&#39;</span>].<span class="bu">str</span>.replace(<span class="vs">r&#39;</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">Zahm</span><span class="dv">.</span><span class="op">*</span><span class="vs">&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;Zahm Hall&#39;</span>, regex<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb27-4"><a href="#cb27-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb27-5"><a href="#cb27-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#get df of just crimes at dorms</span></span>
<span id="cb27-6"><a href="#cb27-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>dorm_crime <span class="op">=</span> crime_df.loc[crime_df[<span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>].isin(dorms[<span class="st">&#39;name&#39;</span>])]</span>
<span id="cb27-7"><a href="#cb27-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb27-8"><a href="#cb27-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#join with stats</span></span>
<span id="cb27-9"><a href="#cb27-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>dorm_combined <span class="op">=</span> pd.merge(dorm_crime, dorms, left_on<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;building&#39;</span>, right_on <span class="op">=</span> <span class="st">&#39;name&#39;</span>, how<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;left&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb27-10"><a href="#cb27-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>dorm_combined</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
<div class="cell-output cell-output-display" data-execution_count="19">
<div>


<table class="dataframe caption-top table table-sm table-striped small" data-border="1">
<thead>
<tr class="header">
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th"></th>
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">incident</th>
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">start_dt</th>
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">end_dt</th>
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">reported_dt</th>
<th data-quarto-table-cell-role="th">offence</th>

</div>
<p>Next we will check out crime by quad to see if there are any crime hubs. South quad male dorms are a huge center of crime, possible due to their proximity to publically accessible parts of campus.</p>
<div id="d5248a36" class="cell" data-execution_count="20">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb28"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb28-1"><a href="#cb28-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#filter for only substance crimes</span></span>
<span id="cb28-2"><a href="#cb28-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>data <span class="op">=</span> dorm_combined.groupby([<span class="st">&#39;sex&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;quad&#39;</span>]).size().reset_index(name<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;count&#39;</span>) </span>
<span id="cb28-3"><a href="#cb28-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb28-4"><a href="#cb28-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>sns.barplot(data, x<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;count&#39;</span>, y<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;quad&#39;</span>, hue<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;sex&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb28-5"><a href="#cb28-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.show()</span>
<span id="cb28-6"><a href="#cb28-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">##aADDD LABELS TO MAKE PRETTIER</span></span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
<div class="cell-output cell-output-display">
<div>
<figure class="figure">
<p><img role="img" src="data:image/png;base64," width="670" height="429" class="figure-img"></p>
</figure>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p>Next, we will compare dorm ‘collegiate vice crime’ rates. Collegiate vice crimes are defined as liquor/intoxication crimes, drug crimes, or fake ID crimes. We calculate a rate by dividing by person and by time period – this corrects for crimes of larger or smaller sized dorms.</p>
<div id="0efa560a" class="cell" data-execution_count="21">
<div class="code-copy-outer-scaffold"><div class="sourceCode cell-code" id="cb29"><pre class="sourceCode python code-with-copy"><code class="sourceCode python"><span id="cb29-1"><a href="#cb29-1" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>vice_crimes <span class="op">=</span> [<span class="st">&#39;LIQUOR VIOLATION&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;PUBLIC INTOXICATION&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;DRUG VIOLATION&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;POSSESSION OF FALSE GOVERNMENT IDENTIFICATION&#39;</span>]</span>
<span id="cb29-2"><a href="#cb29-2" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>data <span class="op">=</span> dorm_combined.loc[dorm_combined[<span class="st">&#39;offence_cat&#39;</span>].isin(vice_crimes)]</span>
<span id="cb29-3"><a href="#cb29-3" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>data <span class="op">=</span> data.groupby([<span class="st">&#39;sex&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;name&#39;</span>]).size().reset_index(name<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;count&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb29-4"><a href="#cb29-4" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>data <span class="op">=</span> pd.merge(data, dorms[[<span class="st">&#39;name&#39;</span>, <span class="st">&#39;approximate_capacity&#39;</span>]], on<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;name&#39;</span>, how<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;left&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb29-5"><a href="#cb29-5" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb29-6"><a href="#cb29-6" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#find timeframe of years to divide by </span></span>
<span id="cb29-7"><a href="#cb29-7" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>timeframe <span class="op">=</span> ((dorm_combined[<span class="st">&#39;reported_dt&#39;</span>].dt.month<span class="op">-</span><span class="dv">1</span>)<span class="op">/</span><span class="dv">12</span> <span class="op">+</span> dorm_combined[<span class="st">&#39;reported_dt&#39;</span>].dt.year).unique()</span>
<span id="cb29-8"><a href="#cb29-8" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>years <span class="op">=</span> <span class="bu">max</span>(timeframe) <span class="op">-</span> <span class="bu">min</span>(timeframe)</span>
<span id="cb29-9"><a href="#cb29-9" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb29-10"><a href="#cb29-10" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a><span class="co">#do calculations</span></span>
<span id="cb29-11"><a href="#cb29-11" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>data[<span class="st">&#39;vice_rate&#39;</span>] <span class="op">=</span> <span class="dv">100</span><span class="op">*</span> data[<span class="st">&#39;count&#39;</span>] <span class="op">/</span> data[<span class="st">&#39;approximate_capacity&#39;</span>].astype(<span class="bu">float</span>) <span class="op">/</span> years</span>
<span id="cb29-12"><a href="#cb29-12" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>data <span class="op">=</span> data.sort_values(<span class="st">&#39;vice_rate&#39;</span>, ascending<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">False</span>).reset_index(drop<span class="op">=</span><span class="va">True</span>)</span>
<span id="cb29-13"><a href="#cb29-13" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a></span>
<span id="cb29-14"><a href="#cb29-14" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>sns.barplot(data, x<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;vice_rate&#39;</span>, y<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;name&#39;</span>, hue<span class="op">=</span><span class="st">&#39;sex&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb29-15"><a href="#cb29-15" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.title(<span class="st">&#39;Collegiate vice crime rate by dorm&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb29-16"><a href="#cb29-16" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.xlabel(<span class="st">&#39;crimes reported per 100 occupants per year&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb29-17"><a href="#cb29-17" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.ylabel(<span class="st">&#39;&#39;</span>)</span>
<span id="cb29-18"><a href="#cb29-18" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></a>plt.show()</span></code></pre></div><button title="Copy to Clipboard" class="code-copy-button"><i class="bi"></i></button></div>
<div class="cell-output cell-output-display">
<div>
<figure class="figure">
<p><img role="img" src="data:image/png;base64," width="688" height="449" class="figure-img"></p>
</figure>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
</section>

</main>
<!-- /main column -->
<script id="quarto-html-after-body" type="application/javascript">
  window.document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function (event) {
    const icon = "";
    const anchorJS = new window.AnchorJS();
    anchorJS.options = {
      placement: 'right',
      icon: icon
    };
    anchorJS.add('.anchored');
    const isCodeAnnotation = (el) => {
      for (const clz of el.classList) {
        if (clz.startsWith('code-annotation-')) {                     
          return true;
        }
      }
      return false;
    }
    const onCopySuccess = function(e) {
      // button target
      const button = e.trigger;
      // don't keep focus
      button.blur();
      // flash "checked"
      button.classList.add('code-copy-button-checked');
      var currentTitle = button.getAttribute("title");
      button.setAttribute("title", "Copied!");
      let tooltip;
      if (window.bootstrap) {
        button.setAttribute("data-bs-toggle", "tooltip");
        button.setAttribute("data-bs-placement", "left");
        button.setAttribute("data-bs-title", "Copied!");
        tooltip = new bootstrap.Tooltip(button, 
          { trigger: "manual", 
            customClass: "code-copy-button-tooltip",
            offset: [0, -8]});
        tooltip.show();    
      }
      setTimeout(function() {
        if (tooltip) {
          tooltip.hide();
          button.removeAttribute("data-bs-title");
          button.removeAttribute("data-bs-toggle");
          button.removeAttribute("data-bs-placement");
        }
        button.setAttribute("title", currentTitle);
        button.classList.remove('code-copy-button-checked');
      }, 1000);
      // clear code selection
      e.clearSelection();
    }
    const getTextToCopy = function(trigger) {
      const outerScaffold = trigger.parentElement.cloneNode(true);
      const codeEl = outerScaffold.querySelector('code');
      for (const childEl of codeEl.children) {
        if (isCodeAnnotation(childEl)) {
          childEl.remove();
        }
      }
      return codeEl.innerText;
    }
    const clipboard = new window.ClipboardJS('.code-copy-button:not([data-in-quarto-modal])', {
      text: getTextToCopy
    });
    clipboard.on('success', onCopySuccess);
    if (window.document.getElementById('quarto-embedded-source-code-modal')) {
      const clipboardModal = new window.ClipboardJS('.code-copy-button[data-in-quarto-modal]', {
        text: getTextToCopy,
        container: window.document.getElementById('quarto-embedded-source-code-modal')
      });
      clipboardModal.on('success', onCopySuccess);
    }
      var localhostRegex = new RegExp(/^(?:http|https):\/\/localhost\:?[0-9]*\//);
      var mailtoRegex = new RegExp(/^mailto:/);
        var filterRegex = new RegExp('/' + window.location.host + '/');
      var isInternal = (href) => {
          return filterRegex.test(href) || localhostRegex.test(href) || mailtoRegex.test(href);
      }
      // Inspect non-navigation links and adorn them if external
     var links = window.document.querySelectorAll('a[href]:not(.nav-link):not(.navbar-brand):not(.toc-action):not(.sidebar-link):not(.sidebar-item-toggle):not(.pagination-link):not(.no-external):not([aria-hidden]):not(.dropdown-item):not(.quarto-navigation-tool):not(.about-link)');
      for (var i=0; i<links.length; i++) {
        const link = links[i];
        if (!isInternal(link.href)) {
          // undo the damage that might have been done by quarto-nav.js in the case of
          // links that we want to consider external
          if (link.dataset.originalHref !== undefined) {
            link.href = link.dataset.originalHref;
          }
        }
      }
    function tippyHover(el, contentFn, onTriggerFn, onUntriggerFn) {
      const config = {
        allowHTML: true,
        maxWidth: 500,
        delay: 100,
        arrow: false,
        appendTo: function(el) {
            return el.parentElement;
        },
        interactive: true,
        interactiveBorder: 10,
        theme: 'quarto',
        placement: 'bottom-start',
      };
      if (contentFn) {
        config.content = contentFn;
      }
      if (onTriggerFn) {
        config.onTrigger = onTriggerFn;
      }
      if (onUntriggerFn) {
        config.onUntrigger = onUntriggerFn;
      }
      window.tippy(el, config); 
    }
    const noterefs = window.document.querySelectorAll('a[role="doc-noteref"]');
    for (var i=0; i<noterefs.length; i++) {
      const ref = noterefs[i];
      tippyHover(ref, function() {
        // use id or data attribute instead here
        let href = ref.getAttribute('data-footnote-href') || ref.getAttribute('href');
        try { href = new URL(href).hash; } catch {}
        const id = href.replace(/^#\/?/, "");
        const note = window.document.getElementById(id);
        if (note) {
          return note.innerHTML;
        } else {
          return "";
        }
      });
    }
    const xrefs = window.document.querySelectorAll('a.quarto-xref');
    const processXRef = (id, note) => {
      // Strip column container classes
      const stripColumnClz = (el) => {
        el.classList.remove("page-full", "page-columns");
        if (el.children) {
          for (const child of el.children) {
            stripColumnClz(child);
          }
        }
      }
      stripColumnClz(note)
      if (id === null || id.startsWith('sec-')) {
        // Special case sections, only their first couple elements
        const container = document.createElement("div");
        if (note.children && note.children.length > 2) {
          container.appendChild(note.children[0].cloneNode(true));
          for (let i = 1; i < note.children.length; i++) {
            const child = note.children[i];
            if (child.tagName === "P" && child.innerText === "") {
              continue;
            } else {
              container.appendChild(child.cloneNode(true));
              break;
            }
          }
          if (window.Quarto?.typesetMath) {
            window.Quarto.typesetMath(container);
          }
          return container.innerHTML
        } else {
          if (window.Quarto?.typesetMath) {
            window.Quarto.typesetMath(note);
          }
          return note.innerHTML;
        }
      } else {
        // Remove any anchor links if they are present
        const anchorLink = note.querySelector('a.anchorjs-link');
        if (anchorLink) {
          anchorLink.remove();
        }
        if (window.Quarto?.typesetMath) {
          window.Quarto.typesetMath(note);
        }
        if (note.classList.contains("callout")) {
          return note.outerHTML;
        } else {
          return note.innerHTML;
        }
      }
    }
    for (var i=0; i<xrefs.length; i++) {
      const xref = xrefs[i];
      tippyHover(xref, undefined, function(instance) {
        instance.disable();
        let url = xref.getAttribute('href');
        let hash = undefined; 
        if (url.startsWith('#')) {
          hash = url;
        } else {
          try { hash = new URL(url).hash; } catch {}
        }
        if (hash) {
          const id = hash.replace(/^#\/?/, "");
          const note = window.document.getElementById(id);
          if (note !== null) {
            try {
              const html = processXRef(id, note.cloneNode(true));
              instance.setContent(html);
            } finally {
              instance.enable();
              instance.show();
            }
          } else {
            // See if we can fetch this
            fetch(url.split('#')[0])
            .then(res => res.text())
            .then(html => {
              const parser = new DOMParser();
              const htmlDoc = parser.parseFromString(html, "text/html");
              const note = htmlDoc.getElementById(id);
              if (note !== null) {
                const html = processXRef(id, note);
                instance.setContent(html);
              } 
            }).finally(() => {
              instance.enable();
              instance.show();
            });
          }
        } else {
          // See if we can fetch a full url (with no hash to target)
          // This is a special case and we should probably do some content thinning / targeting
          fetch(url)
          .then(res => res.text())
          .then(html => {
            const parser = new DOMParser();
            const htmlDoc = parser.parseFromString(html, "text/html");
            const note = htmlDoc.querySelector('main.content');
            if (note !== null) {
              // This should only happen for chapter cross references
              // (since there is no id in the URL)
              // remove the first header
              if (note.children.length > 0 && note.children[0].tagName === "HEADER") {
                note.children[0].remove();
              }
              const html = processXRef(null, note);
              instance.setContent(html);
            } 
          }).finally(() => {
            instance.enable();
            instance.show();
          });
        }
      }, function(instance) {
      });
    }
        let selectedAnnoteEl;
        const selectorForAnnotation = ( cell, annotation) => {
          let cellAttr = 'data-code-cell="' + cell + '"';
          let lineAttr = 'data-code-annotation="' +  annotation + '"';
          const selector = 'span[' + cellAttr + '][' + lineAttr + ']';
          return selector;
        }
        const selectCodeLines = (annoteEl) => {
          const doc = window.document;
          const targetCell = annoteEl.getAttribute("data-target-cell");
          const targetAnnotation = annoteEl.getAttribute("data-target-annotation");
          const annoteSpan = window.document.querySelector(selectorForAnnotation(targetCell, targetAnnotation));
          const lines = annoteSpan.getAttribute("data-code-lines").split(",");
          const lineIds = lines.map((line) => {
            return targetCell + "-" + line;
          })
          let top = null;
          let height = null;
          let parent = null;
          if (lineIds.length > 0) {
              //compute the position of the single el (top and bottom and make a div)
              const el = window.document.getElementById(lineIds[0]);
              top = el.offsetTop;
              height = el.offsetHeight;
              parent = el.parentElement.parentElement;
            if (lineIds.length > 1) {
              const lastEl = window.document.getElementById(lineIds[lineIds.length - 1]);
              const bottom = lastEl.offsetTop + lastEl.offsetHeight;
              height = bottom - top;
            }
            if (top !== null && height !== null && parent !== null) {
              // cook up a div (if necessary) and position it 
              let div = window.document.getElementById("code-annotation-line-highlight");
              if (div === null) {
                div = window.document.createElement("div");
                div.setAttribute("id", "code-annotation-line-highlight");
                div.style.position = 'absolute';
                parent.appendChild(div);
              }
              div.style.top = top - 2 + "px";
              div.style.height = height + 4 + "px";
              div.style.left = 0;
              let gutterDiv = window.document.getElementById("code-annotation-line-highlight-gutter");
              if (gutterDiv === null) {
                gutterDiv = window.document.createElement("div");
                gutterDiv.setAttribute("id", "code-annotation-line-highlight-gutter");
                gutterDiv.style.position = 'absolute';
                const codeCell = window.document.getElementById(targetCell);
                const gutter = codeCell.querySelector('.code-annotation-gutter');
                gutter.appendChild(gutterDiv);
              }
              gutterDiv.style.top = top - 2 + "px";
              gutterDiv.style.height = height + 4 + "px";
            }
            selectedAnnoteEl = annoteEl;
          }
        };
        const unselectCodeLines = () => {
          const elementsIds = ["code-annotation-line-highlight", "code-annotation-line-highlight-gutter"];
          elementsIds.forEach((elId) => {
            const div = window.document.getElementById(elId);
            if (div) {
              div.remove();
            }
          });
          selectedAnnoteEl = undefined;
        };
          // Handle positioning of the toggle
      window.addEventListener(
        "resize",
        throttle(() => {
          elRect = undefined;
          if (selectedAnnoteEl) {
            selectCodeLines(selectedAnnoteEl);
          }
        }, 10)
      );
      function throttle(fn, ms) {
      let throttle = false;
      let timer;
        return (...args) => {
          if(!throttle) { // first call gets through
              fn.apply(this, args);
              throttle = true;
          } else { // all the others get throttled
              if(timer) clearTimeout(timer); // cancel #2
              timer = setTimeout(() => {
                fn.apply(this, args);
                timer = throttle = false;
              }, ms);
          }
        };
      }
        // Attach click handler to the DT
        const annoteDls = window.document.querySelectorAll('dt[data-target-cell]');
        for (const annoteDlNode of annoteDls) {
          annoteDlNode.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            const clickedEl = event.target;
            if (clickedEl !== selectedAnnoteEl) {
              unselectCodeLines();
              const activeEl = window.document.querySelector('dt[data-target-cell].code-annotation-active');
              if (activeEl) {
                activeEl.classList.remove('code-annotation-active');
              }
              selectCodeLines(clickedEl);
              clickedEl.classList.add('code-annotation-active');
            } else {
              // Unselect the line
              unselectCodeLines();
              clickedEl.classList.remove('code-annotation-active');
            }
          });
        }
    const findCites = (el) => {
      const parentEl = el.parentElement;
      if (parentEl) {
        const cites = parentEl.dataset.cites;
        if (cites) {
          return {
            el,
            cites: cites.split(' ')
          };
        } else {
          return findCites(el.parentElement)
        }
      } else {
        return undefined;
      }
    };
    var bibliorefs = window.document.querySelectorAll('a[role="doc-biblioref"]');
    for (var i=0; i<bibliorefs.length; i++) {
      const ref = bibliorefs[i];
      const citeInfo = findCites(ref);
      if (citeInfo) {
        tippyHover(citeInfo.el, function() {
          var popup = window.document.createElement('div');
          citeInfo.cites.forEach(function(cite) {
            var citeDiv = window.document.createElement('div');
            citeDiv.classList.add('hanging-indent');
            citeDiv.classList.add('csl-entry');
            var biblioDiv = window.document.getElementById('ref-' + cite);
            if (biblioDiv) {
              citeDiv.innerHTML = biblioDiv.innerHTML;
            }
            popup.appendChild(citeDiv);
          });
          return popup.innerHTML;
        });
      }
    }
  });
  </script>
</div> <!-- /content -->




</body></html>
